text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Lately, I've been playing with this<n>little girl while
she waits for her mom<n>to finish work.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
She wants to play tag today, but it's<n>not very fun
with just two players,<n>sooo...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Would you like to join us? Only if you<n>want to, of
course! Whaddya say?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I'm used to looking after my<n>little sisters,
but even I'm not good<n>enough to pull off tag with
only two<n>players...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but don't feel obligated to go<n>all-out with us
or anything! I know<n>you're probably tired from
work and<n>all.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Phew, great work! Who knew playing<n>tag at such
a leisurely pace would be<n>so fun!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I conserved a lot of energy by<n>casually jogging
most of the time, so<n>it was super easy to sprint
at my<n>target at the very last moment!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yup, yup! Y'know what? I think that<n>ended up
being great training! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Great job! Honestly... I wasn't<n>expecting you to
play tag with as<n>much enthusiasm as the kid...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: But I was impressed! You were so<n>cool!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Even I got caught up in you guys'<n>energy and
got all worked up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm exhausted from the game of tag,<n>but seeing
Ines Fujin run up close<n>was a very educational
experience.
